strategy.name: Multi-Time Frame Swing Low/Liquidity Sweep
strategy.description: A multi-time frame strategy that combines higher time frame trend analysis with lower time frame entry signals, focusing on liquidity sweeps and swing points.

htf_trend_bullish.description: HTF (Daily/4H) must show bullish trend (higher highs, higher lows, price above moving average)

swing_low_identified.description: Identify nearest significant swing low on 15m chart and note price level

liquidity_sweep_confirmed.description: Price sweeps below the swing low (triggering stop losses), with optional volume confirmation

retest_and_close_inside.description: After sweep, price reverses and 15m candle closes INSIDE the range of the swing low candle

entry_signal.description: 1m candle CLOSES above the closing price of the prior 15m candle that swept the swing low

htf_trend_bearish.description: HTF (Daily/4H) must show bearish trend (lower lows, lower highs, price below moving average)

swing_high_identified.description: Identify nearest significant swing high on 15m chart and note price level

liquidity_sweep_confirmed.description: Price sweeps above the swing high (triggering stop losses), with optional volume confirmation

retest_and_close_inside.description: After sweep, price reverses and 15m candle closes INSIDE the range of the swing high candle

entry_signal.description: 1m candle CLOSES below the closing price of the prior 15m candle that swept the swing high

take_profit_options.description: Nearest swing high (for sells) or swing low (for buys) on 15m timeframe

volume_confirmation.description: Volume indicator can be used to confirm liquidity sweeps
